chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P No.S-1534 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 07.11.2016. Mr. Omparkash H. Karmani, Advocate alongwith petitioner. Mr. Ali Abbas Memon, State Counsel a/w S.I Muhammad Juman Khoso, SHO P.S Sanghar, Manzoor Ali SHO P.S B-Section Tandoadam and SIP Buland Khan I/C CIA Mirpurkhas. = Some of the official respondents are also in attendance and through learned State Counsel have filed parawise comments, in which while denying the allegations of causing harassment made by the petitioner, they have stated that petitioner was booked in FIRs No.141/2013 and 85/2015. The petitioner’s Counsel has controverted this position and submits that while referring to Page-29 of the Court file that in one of the crime numbers the learned Court has acquitted the petitioner. The present petition is disposed of in view of the above observation and comments filed by the police officials with further direction that while prosecuting the petitioner due process of law should be followed and police officials should conduct themselves strictly in accordance with law. Similarly, the petitioner in respect of his main grievance that certain articles were taken away from his residence by the police officials, can seek remedy before the concerned forum. JUDGE Shahid
